title: Algerian Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional chicken tacos, this Algerian-inspired recipe combines roasted chicken with a blend of spices and herbs.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, black pepper, and Algerian spice blend.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is cooking, warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of diced roasted red peppers, a sprinkle of parsley, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve immediately and garnish with chopped cilantro.
